name: FF_CONTEXTS_VL
query: SELECT B.CONTEXT_ID CONTEXT_ID, B.BASE_CONTEXT_NAME BASE_CONTEXT_NAME, TL.CONTEXT_NAME CONTEXT_NAME, TL.DESCRIPTION DESCRIPTION, B.DATA_TYPE DATA_TYPE, B.USER_CONTEXT_FLAG USER_CONTEXT_FLAG, B.ENTERPRISE_ID ENTERPRISE_ID, B.LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID, B.LEGISLATION_CODE LEGISLATION_CODE, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, B.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, B.MODULE_ID MODULE_ID FROM FF_CONTEXTS_B B, FF_CONTEXTS_TL TL WHERE B.CONTEXT_ID = TL.CONTEXT_ID AND TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
